overall.description: A cinematic slow pan through a cozy, rustic kitchen interior featuring stone walls, wooden ceiling beams, and a central dining table. The scene is rendered in a game engine with warm mixed lighting from windows and interior sources, showcasing detailed props including fruit, bread, potted plants, and vintage furniture.

small arched window high on the wall near the ceiling
three large terracotta pots stacked beside the window
long rustic wooden table set with fruit bowl and bread
wooden bowl filled with apples and pears
bunches of dried herbs hanging from wooden ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cozy corner of a rustic stone kitchen, focusing on a wall with two windows letting in natural blue light. A wooden dining table occupies the foreground with a bowl of fresh fruit, while large terracotta pots and hanging herbs add to the pastoral atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: kitchen cooking area with stone fireplace

events.description: camera pans left from window wall to reveal large stone fireplace and cooking area

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan around the room, revealing the fireplace and sideboard area

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with dark interior and wooden mantel above
vintage cast iron wood stove with blue finish
long wooden serving table against the wall
wooden rack holding multiple loaves of bread

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans left, the view transitions to the kitchen's cooking area dominated by a large stone fireplace and a vintage blue stove. A wooden sideboard with a bread rack comes into view on the left, while the dining table shifts to the right side of the frame.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning to reveal the left wall of the kitchen, showcasing a shuttered window, a tall shelf filled with potted plants, and wooden stools. The dining table now appears on the left side of the frame, and a hanging flower basket adds color to the stone wall.

lighting becomes noticeably dimmer as camera faces away from windows into the corner

agents.ego_description: completing the circuit around the room, focusing on the back wall storage and door

tall wooden shelving unit densely packed with terracotta pots and green plants
wicker baskets mounted on the stone wall for storage

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the back corner of the kitchen, featuring a heavy wooden door and a tall shelf filled with potted plants. The lighting grows dimmer as the camera faces away from the windows, highlighting wall-mounted storage baskets and completing the 360-degree view of the rustic interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous panning motion through a rustic stone kitchen, moving from a bright, window-lit corner toward the dimmer, secluded recesses of the room. It begins focused on a wooden dining table with fresh fruit, where natural blue light streams through two windows and illuminates hanging herbs and terracotta pots. As the camera pans left, the view shifts toward the cooking area, transitioning from the dining space to a large stone fireplace and a vintage blue stove beside a wooden sideboard. The scene then expands to reveal the left wall, where the light softens around a shuttered window, tall shelves of potted plants, and a colorful hanging flower basket. Finally, the camera glides into the back corner, moving away from the windows into deeper shadows to reveal a heavy wooden door and wall-mounted storage baskets.
